name: hydroflow
description: HydroFlow IoT monitoring system for shrimp farms

scripts.dev: bun run dev:services && sleep 2 && bash -c 'lsof -ti:4000,4001 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; trap "kill 0" EXIT; bun run dev:backend & bun run dev:frontend & sleep 3 && bun run mqtt:mock'
scripts.dev:quick: bash -c 'lsof -ti:4000,4001 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; trap "kill 0" EXIT; bun run dev:backend & bun run dev:frontend'
scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd backend && bunx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && bunx prisma db seed

author: Freddy Amarante (Valencia Web Design)
